creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 152861
complete port for x11-fm/gentoo3 (shar)

This is a GTK3 version of the x11-fm/gentoo port.
This is built against upstream' 0.20.4. All attempts
to use their latest version (0.20.6) failed. I made
*many* changes, and got it a ways. But in the end,
there just *too* many "corrections" to make. So,
after additional testing, I found 0.20.4 to be the
best choice. As it proved to be their most stable
GTK3 branch.

Please find the shar file, attached. For all the
goodies to make this new port possible.

Please also find a complete session log. That
covers all testing, as well as install && deinstall,
also attached.

Thanks!

--Chris
